description: Create a comprehensive analysis document that covers: (1) What Swiggy/Zepto-like features and UX patterns are missing from the app, (2) Which sections are confusing for customer, admin, and staff users - focusing on missing headings, poor flow, and unclear navigation. This should be written as a detailed recommendation document at .agents/reports/swiggy-zepto-gap-analysis.md
steps: Create the file .agents/reports/swiggy-zepto-gap-analysis.md with the following comprehensive sections:

PART 1 - Swiggy/Zepto Feature Gap Analysis: Analyze what popular q-commerce features are missing including: address-first flow (location before browsing), delivery time promise on every screen, search with instant results + add-to-cart, category-based browsing with sub-categories, repeat/reorder functionality, rain/surge pricing indicators, membership/subscription programs (like Swiggy One/Zepto Pass), order scheduling, tip for delivery partner, live tracking map with real-time rider location, multi-language support, rating/review system for products, referral rewards, smart suggestions (frequently bought together), express checkout, bill splitting, delivery instructions, order chat with rider, estimated savings summary, notification preferences granularity, in-app wallet top-up via UPI/card

PART 2 - Confusing Sections Analysis for CUSTOMERS: Identify areas with missing headings, unclear flow, dead-end navigation. Cover: homepage sections without clear hierarchy (Weekly Best Selling vs Most Selling vs Fresh Picks - all look the same), product browse page has only 'Browse' as heading with no guidance, cart page delegates entirely to client component with no server-side heading or context, dashboard/orders page has a heading but live banner placement may confuse, checkout flow has no step indicator or progress bar, account page has proper sections but wallet/rewards/loyalty pages may be empty shells, no breadcrumbs anywhere, no 'back to shopping' prompts after order placement

PART 3 - Confusing Sections Analysis for ADMIN: Cover: admin dashboard has good metrics but 20+ nav items in horizontal scroll (mobile) is overwhelming, no onboarding or guided tour for new admin users, orders page jumps straight to a dense table with no summary header, settings page has too many scattered config points, reports only show today's data on web (no date picker), no 'quick actions' panel for common tasks, dispatch page purpose unclear without context

PART 4 - Confusing Sections Analysis for STAFF (delivery/packing): Cover: mobile staff app has no onboarding, delivery partner profile page may be a dead-end, status labels show raw enums on some screens, no clear visual hierarchy between active vs completed orders, packing screen has no priority indicators, no shift/availability toggle
PART 5 - Priority Recommendations: Ranked list of top 15 features to add to match Swiggy/Zepto UX, grouped by effort (quick wins vs medium vs large investments)
acceptance_criteria: The file .agents/reports/swiggy-zepto-gap-analysis.md exists and contains all 5 parts
Each part has specific references to actual file paths and component names in the codebase
The analysis is grounded in actual code findings, not generic advice
Priority recommendations include effort estimates and specific implementation suggestions
verification: Confirm the file exists and has substantial content (at least 300 lines)
Confirm all 5 parts are present with proper markdown headings
findings: Report created at .agents/reports/swiggy-zepto-gap-analysis.md (886 lines, 5 parts). All sections reference actual file paths in the codebase. No build/test verification needed as this is a documentation-only change.
